security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Run open-source LLMs locally on your machine.
bundle.longDescription: LocalModel Studio is a self-contained desktop app for chatting with open-source language models. Inference runs entirely on your hardware via llama.cpp — no servers, no API keys, no telemetry. Ships with a starter model so it works the moment you install it.
